verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm awaken over this morning From a peaceful sleep last night to a new sensation I cannot explain I'm awake or I am dreamin For the thoughts tha fill my mind When I slumbered in the night had something changed

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Then I knew that I had finally reached heaven A place that I have dreamed about so long I knew that I had finally reached heaven For all eternity I'm finally home

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Going quickly to the window to open up the blind Like I have done at least a thousand times Instantly to my amazing I will see Him more the light And I saw the new Jerusalem foretold
